name: Coconut Oats Dinner

cook_steps: [{"step_number": 1, "instruction": "Rinse rolled oats and drain them in a colander."}, {"step_number": 2, "instruction": "Gently fluff up immediately and set aside."}, {"step_number": 3, "instruction": "Heat a pan with oil."}, {"step_number": 4, "instruction": "Add mustard, cumin , urad dal, chana dal and peanuts."}, {"step_number": 5, "instruction": "Fry them until the peanuts are golden."}, {"step_number": 6, "instruction": "Then add in hing, ginger, green chilies and curry leaves."}, {"step_number": 7, "instruction": "Saute them quickly until the curry leaves turn crisp."}, {"step_number": 8, "instruction": "Then pour 2 tbsp water. name: Shrimp Curry Recipe

name: Veg Puff Recipe (Bakery Vegetable Puffs)
ingredients_json: [{"raw_text": "1 puff pastry sheet ((cut to 4 squares))", "source_position": 1}, {"raw_text": "1 tablespoon oil ((15 ml))", "source_position": 2}, {"raw_text": "½ teaspoon crushed fennel seeds ( (optional))", "source_position": 3}, {"raw_text": "1 small onion ((⅓ cup/45 grams fine chopped, may omit))", "source_position": 4}, {"raw_text": "1 sprig curry leaves ((optional))", "source_position": 5}, {"raw_text": "1 green chili ((chopped, optional))", "source_position": 6}, {"raw_text": "1 teaspoon ginger garlic paste ((or ¾ tsp each grated))", "source_position": 7}, {"raw_text": "¼ to ½ teaspoon Kashmiri red chili powder (or paprika)", "source_position": 8}, {"raw_text": "¼ teaspoon turmeric", "source_position": 9}, {"raw_text": "½ teaspoon garam masala ( (more if you want))", "source_position": 10}, {"raw_text": "½ teaspoon sea salt ((adjust to taste))", "source_position": 11}, {"raw_text": "1 teaspoon lemon juice ( (optional))", "source_position": 12}, {"raw_text": "1 tablespoon coriander leaves ( (or 1 tsp kasuri methi))", "source_position": 13}, {"raw_text": "1 cup diced potato ( (150 grams - 1 medium, peel & dice to ¾ inch))", "source_position": 14}, {"raw_text": "½ cup diced carrots ( (70 grams - 1 medium, peel & dice))", "source_position": 15}, {"raw_text": "½ cup green peas ( (60 grams - frozen or fresh, may sub half with sweet corn))", "source_position": 16}, {"raw_text": "2 tablespoons unsalted melted butter ((milk or a beaten egg with 2 tbsps milk))", "source_position": 17}]
cook_steps: [{"step_number": 1, "instruction": "Place diced potatoes, carrots & peas in a steaming basket or a wide bowl. Steam in a pot or pressure cooker until cooked through. I use my instant pot to steam on high pressure for 6 mins."}, {"step_number": 2, "instruction": "Heat a pan with oil and add the fennel seeds. When they begin to sizzle add onions, curry leaves, green chilies and half of the salt. Saute until light golden for 4 mins."}, {"step_number": 3, "instruction": "Add ginger garlic and fry for a minute. Reduce the flame and stir in chili powder, turmeric, garam masala and remaining salt."}, {"step_number": 4, "instruction": "Pour 2 to 3 tablespoon of water and deglaze the pan. Stir in the steamed veggies & saute for 2 mins. Turn off."}, {"step_number": 5, "instruction": "Mix in coriander leaves and lemon juice if you want. Taste test to adjust salt. Cool down completely. If you want may remove the curry leaves & discard."}, {"step_number": 6, "instruction": "Meanwhile thaw your puff pastry sheets at room temperature, until easy enough to handle. Mine takes only 5 to 6 mins. (Depends on your indoor temp)"}, {"step_number": 7, "instruction": "Cut each pastry sheet to 4 portions. Place 3 to 4 tbsps vegetable stuffing in the center of each cut puff pastry. (don't overfill) Brush 2 parallel edges with little water."}, {"step_number": 8, "instruction": "Bring one edge over the other and gently tap with your fingers, don’t press down with pressure. I prefer to leave a little gap on the sides for the steam to escape. This keeps the puffs crispy slightly longer."}, {"step_number": 9, "instruction": "Brush with unsalted melted butter or milk and place in the refrigerator for 15 to 20 mins. Meanwhile preheat the oven to 400 F/ 200 C for 15 to 20 mins."}, {"step_number": 10, "instruction": "Place in the center and bake for 20 to 22 mins or as instructed on the package, until golden & flaky. (Smaller ovens and toasters may take only 15 mins)"}, {"step_number": 11, "instruction": "Cool the tray on a wired rack for at least 5 mins. Serve Vegetable puffs hot or warm with ketchup, cilantro/coriander chutney & chai."}]

name: Palak Tofu (Spinach Tofu)

cook_steps: [{"step_number": 1, "instruction": "Marinate: In a medium bowl, mix together chili powder, garam masala, salt, lemon juice and water or yogurt. Cover and rest until needed later or in the refrigerator overnight, up to 2 days."}, {"step_number": 2, "instruction": "Heat oil in a pan and add onion, ginger, garlic and green chilies. Return to the pan & stir in salt, cardamom, garam masala & cumin powder. Cook for 3 to 5 mins, until thick."}, {"step_number": 7, "instruction": "Add crushed kasuri methi and turn off."}, {"step_number": 8, "instruction": "Pan Fry: Meanwhile, heat oil in a pan and add the marinated tofu. name: Gulab Jamun Recipe
ingredients_json: [{"raw_text": "1 cup milk powder", "source_position": 1}, {"raw_text": "5 tbsp all-purpose flour ((maida))", "source_position": 2}, {"raw_text": "1 tsp ghee (or oil)", "source_position": 3}, {"raw_text": "1 tbsp ghee (or oil for greasing)", "source_position": 4}, {"raw_text": "2 to 4 tbsp milk ((use more as needed))", "source_position": 5}, {"raw_text": "1 tbsp curd ((yogurt or ¾ tbsp lemon juice))", "source_position": 6}, {"raw_text": "1 large pinch Baking soda (or 1/8 th tsp)", "source_position": 7}, {"raw_text": "Ghee (or oil for deep frying)", "source_position": 8}, {"raw_text": "1 tsp pistachios (chopped )", "source_position": 9}, {"raw_text": "1 ¼ to 1 ½ cups Sugar", "source_position": 10}, {"raw_text": "1 ½ cup water", "source_position": 11}, {"raw_text": "4 pods green cardamom (or ¼ tsp cardamom powder)", "source_position": 12}, {"raw_text": "1 tsp rose water", "source_position": 13}]
cook_steps: [{"step_number": 1, "instruction": "Add 1.5 cups sugar and lightly crushed 4 green cardamoms to a pot. You can also use organic or turbinado sugar, the color of the syrup will be darker."}, {"step_number": 2, "instruction": "Pour 1.5 cups water."}, {"step_number": 3, "instruction": "Boil this until the syrup turns slightly sticky. To check this, cool little syrup in a small plate. Dip your fore finger in it and touch with your thumb. You should feel it is slightly sticky. It should not reach one string consistency."}, {"step_number": 4, "instruction": "If you fail to make the syrup correctly, then the jamuns will not soak the syrup and turn soft. If you go past the sticky syrup stage, you will end up in a one string consistency. In that case, add little water and stir. Check again. Switch off. Add rose water."}, {"step_number": 5, "instruction": "To a wide pot, add sugar and water. Heat on a medium flame until the sugar dissolves. The let the syrup boil until it reaches a sticky consistency."}, {"step_number": 6, "instruction": "Add rose water, cardamom powder and lemon juice. Mix well and set it aside to keep the syrup slightly hot."}, {"step_number": 7, "instruction": "In a mixing bowl, stir together grated mawa, add flour, cardamom powder and then baking powder."}, {"step_number": 8, "instruction": "Pour milk only as needed little by little to make a smooth crack-free dough. You can gently knead it but don’t over knead as it affects the texture and forms gluten. You must get a dough ball that is smooth with not many cracks. It should not be dry or crumbly."}, {"step_number": 9, "instruction": "Heat oil in a deep pot or kadai."}, {"step_number": 10, "instruction": "Check if the oil is hot by gently sliding a small piece of dough. It must go in and rise slowly with bubbles & should not brown. This is the right time to fry the balls."}, {"step_number": 11, "instruction": "Regulate the flame to medium. Begin to drop one ball at a time. Slowly add as many balls as possible."}, {"step_number": 12, "instruction": "After frying for few minutes they will firm up. The syrup should not be very hot. When you dip your finger you must feel the syrup is hot but not very hot."}, {"step_number": 15, "instruction": "Gently rotate the gulab jamuns in the syrup. Let them soak for 45 mintues before serving."}, {"step_number": 16, "instruction": "Serve gulab jamun with sugar syrup or vanilla ice cream. Garnish with thinly sliced pistachios."}]

name: Cumin Powder (Roasted Jeera Powder)
cook_steps: [{"step_number": 1, "instruction": "Clean cumin seeds and add them to a heavy bottom pan. Turn on the heat to medium and keep stirring until the seeds become hot to touch."}, {"step_number": 2, "instruction": "Reduce the heat to the lowest and roast them. Keep stirring continuously so the seeds roast evenly."}, {"step_number": 3, "instruction": "When done, they will emit a strong earthy, pungent and smoky aroma. Remove from heat. Do not over roast they will burn and taste bitter."}, {"step_number": 4, "instruction": "Cool them completely and add to a grinder. If you plan to store for longer, store in smaller jars and use them one after the other so most of the aroma is retained."}, {"step_number": 6, "instruction": "Use cumin powder as needed in curries, stir fry dishes, soups, salads and chaats."}]

Pour the hot tea in a slow stream, back to the chai pot from a height of 1 to 1½ feet."}, {"step_number": 8, "instruction": "Repeat this step of pulling hot masala chai from the pot to the cup, a few times (4 to 5 times). This breaks down the layer of cream and incorporates it back to the masala chai making it more tasty and thick."}, {"step_number": 9, "instruction": "Strain the masala chai to serving cups & serve with any breakfast, snack or biscuits."}, {"step_number": 10, "instruction": "Clean all the spices and add to a blender jar. Powder finely. Store it in an airtight glass jar."}, {"step_number": 11, "instruction": "Use about ½ to ¾ tsp or more to make 2 servings of tea. For stronger tea you can use about ¾ tsp."}]

name: Egg Puff Recipe (Bakery Style)
ingredients_json: [{"raw_text": "1 puff pastry sheet ( cut to 4 portions)", "source_position": 1}, {"raw_text": "2 hard-boiled eggs ( halved)", "source_position": 2}, {"raw_text": "1 raw egg (beaten with 1 tbsp milk)", "source_position": 3}, {"raw_text": "1½ tablespoons coconut oil", "source_position": 4}, {"raw_text": "4 to 5 fresh curry leaves", "source_position": 5}, {"raw_text": "2 cups (200 grams) red onions ((sliced & layers seperated, 1 large or 4 small))", "source_position": 6}, {"raw_text": "1 green chili (chopped (deseed for low heat))", "source_position": 7}, {"raw_text": "1 teaspoon ginger garlic paste ((or 2 large garlic cloves + ½ inch peeled ginger))", "source_position": 8}, {"raw_text": "½ teaspoon sea salt ((note pastry is salted))", "source_position": 9}, {"raw_text": "½ to ¾ teaspoon Kashmiri chili powder ((cut down for low heat, or may omit))", "source_position": 10}, {"raw_text": "½ to ¾ teaspoon garam masala", "source_position": 11}, {"raw_text": "½ teaspoon ground or crushed fennel seeds", "source_position": 12}, {"raw_text": "¼ teaspoon crushed pepper", "source_position": 13}, {"raw_text": "2 tablespoons water (or use 1 tbsp tomato ketchup + 1 tbsp water)", "source_position": 14}]
cook_steps: [{"step_number": 1, "instruction": "Heat oil in a wide pan and add onions, green chilies, curry leaves chilies and salt. Saute on a medium heat for until golden and evenly caramelized."}, {"step_number": 2, "instruction": "Stir in the ginger garlic and cook for a minute until aromatic."}, {"step_number": 3, "instruction": "Reduce the heat and stir in chili powder, garam masala, fennel & black pepper. Deglaze with water (or tomato ketchup) & cook for a minute. Turn off and cool down completely."}, {"step_number": 4, "instruction": "Meanwhile thaw your puff pastry sheets at room temperature, until easy enough to handle. Mine takes only 6 to 7 mins. (May be different depending on the temp)"}, {"step_number": 5, "instruction": "Cut each sheet to 4 portions."}, {"step_number": 6, "instruction": "Place 1½ to 2 tbsps. of onion masala in the center of each cut puff pastry. Place a halved egg, (yolk facing the onions) on each pastry. If your pastry is too dry, you can brush the corners with little water."}, {"step_number": 7, "instruction": "Bring one of the corners over the egg & place it there. Bring the diagonally opposite corner over it & stick. Repeat with the other 2 corners, leaving a little gap for the steam to escape."}, {"step_number": 8, "instruction": "Brush with beaten egg and place in the refrigerator for 15 to 20 mins. Meanwhile preheat the oven to 390 F/ 200 C for 15 to 20 mins."}, {"step_number": 9, "instruction": "Place in the center and bake for 18 to 20 mins or as instructed on the package, until golden, crisp & flaky. (Smaller ovens and toasters will take much lesser time, around 15 mins)"}, {"step_number": 10, "instruction": "Cool the tray on a wired rack for at least 5 mins. Serve Egg Puffs with ketchup & chai."}]
